data.name: RentEase - House Rental Platform
data.description: Cloud-based house rental platform built with MERN stack. Features include user authentication, property listings with advanced search filters, booking management, and secure payment integration. Deployed on cloud infrastructure.

data.name: E-Commerce Application
data.description: Full stack e-commerce application with secure payment integration. Features include product catalog with categories, shopping cart functionality, user authentication & authorization, order management system, and admin dashboard for inventory management.

data.name: Personal Portfolio Website
data.description: Responsive personal portfolio website showcasing projects, skills, certifications, and achievements. Built with React and modern UI/UX design principles. Features include dark mode, smooth animations, and contact form integration.
